MINI MINUTES: John McGrath appearing for Hospice of the Foothill. Heather Certik appeared. Baron Miller appearing for executor. Anne Johnson appearing for Hospia. Ms. Certik sworn and examined. Cross examined by Ms. Johnson. Court's ruling on 12/19 stands. Distribution will be to Hospice of the Foothill. Court is re-issuing the 12/19 ruling. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
